screen.auracraft.title: Choose Your Aura
message.auracraft.ui_disabled: The Aura UI is currently disabled.
message.auracraft.invalid_aura: That is not a valid Aura.
message.auracraft.aura_disabled: That Aura is disabled in the config.
message.auracraft.no_points: You have no Aura Points to spend.
message.auracraft.max_capacity: You are already at full Aura capacity!
message.auracraft.upgrade_cap: Your %s Aura is already at max level.
message.auracraft.aura_upgraded: Your %s Aura was upgraded to level %s!
message.auracraft.max_auras: You already have the maximum of %s Auras.
message.auracraft.aura.ui_disabled: The Aura UI has been disabled.
message.auracraft.withdraw_no_auras: You have no Auras or Points to withdraw.
message.auracraft.withdrawn: Withdrew %s point(s). Aura Plus added to your inventory.
message.auracraft.version_mismatch: AuraCraft version mismatch: server uses protocol v%s, your client sent v%s. Please update your AuraCraft mod.
message.auracraft.pvp_lost_upgrade: You lost an upgrade level on %s!
message.auracraft.kill_dropped_plus: You killed a player. They dropped Aura!
aura.description.minecraft.speed: Increases movement speed. Higher levels make you move faster.
aura.description.minecraft.slowness: Reduces movement speed. Higher levels slow you down further.
aura.description.minecraft.haste: Increases mining speed. Higher levels let you break blocks faster.
aura.description.minecraft.mining_fatigu: Reduces mining speed. Makes breaking blocks significantly slower.
aura.description.minecraft.strength: Increases melee attack damage. Higher levels hit harder.
aura.description.minecraft.instant_healt: Instantly restores a portion of health. Higher levels restore more.
aura.description.minecraft.instant_damag: Instantly deals damage. Higher levels deal more damage.
aura.description.minecraft.jump_boost: Increases jump height and reduces fall damage. Higher levels jump higher.
aura.description.minecraft.nausea: Causes a disorienting wobble effect on your screen.
aura.description.minecraft.regeneration: Slowly restores health over time. Higher levels regenerate faster.
aura.description.minecraft.resistance: Reduces all incoming damage. Higher levels reduce more damage.
aura.description.minecraft.fire_resistan: Grants complete immunity to fire, lava, and heat damage.
aura.description.minecraft.water_breathi: Allows you to breathe indefinitely underwater.
aura.description.minecraft.invisibility: Makes you invisible to mobs and players. Armor remains faintly visible.
aura.description.minecraft.blindness: Severely limits your vision range and obscures your view.
aura.description.minecraft.night_vision: Allows you to see clearly in complete darkness.
aura.description.minecraft.hunger: Rapidly drains your food bar over time.
aura.description.minecraft.weakness: Reduces melee attack damage. Higher levels reduce damage further.
aura.description.minecraft.poison: Deals damage over time but cannot kill you below half a heart.
aura.description.minecraft.wither: Deals damage over time and can kill. Turns your health bar black.
aura.description.minecraft.health_boost: Increases your maximum health. Higher levels add more hearts.
aura.description.minecraft.absorption: Adds extra golden hearts that absorb damage before your real health.
aura.description.minecraft.saturation: Constantly restores hunger and saturation. Keeps your food bar full.
aura.description.minecraft.glowing: Causes you and nearby entities to glow with a visible outline.
aura.description.minecraft.levitation: Causes you to float upward uncontrollably.
aura.description.minecraft.luck: Improves the quality of loot from fishing and chests.
aura.description.minecraft.unluck: Reduces the quality of loot from fishing and chests.
aura.description.minecraft.slow_falling: Greatly reduces fall speed and eliminates all fall damage.
aura.description.minecraft.conduit_power: Grants underwater breathing, night vision, and increased mining speed.
aura.description.minecraft.dolphins_grac: Dramatically increases swimming speed when near dolphins.
aura.description.minecraft.bad_omen: Triggers a raid when you enter a village. Gained by defeating raid captains.
aura.description.minecraft.hero_of_the_v: Causes villagers to offer discounts and throw gifts at you.
aura.description.minecraft.darkness: Periodically darkens your vision making it hard to see.
aura.description.minecraft.raid_omen: A precursor to Bad Omen. Converts to Bad Omen upon entering a village.
aura.description.minecraft.trial_omen: Causes trial spawners to become ominous, spawning harder enemies.
aura.description.minecraft.wind_charged: Causes you to emit a burst of wind energy when you die.
aura.description.minecraft.weaving: Causes you to spread cobwebs when you die.
aura.description.minecraft.oozing: Causes you to spawn slimes when you die.
aura.description.minecraft.infested: Causes you to spawn silverfish when you take damage.
aura.description.minecraft.breath_of_the: Attracts a conduit towards you when underwater.
message.auracraft.reset_no_auras: You have no Auras to reset.
message.auracraft.reset_no_history: You have not selected any Auras yet.
message.auracraft.reset_used: Your Auras have been reset. %s point(s) refunded.
screen.auracraft.tip_choose: Choose this Aura to activate it.
screen.auracraft.tip_upgrade: Choose again to upgrade this Aura.
